content.en:
"Ye Tian, I want to test your strength, I don't know if it's okay?"

The Longqin Palace Lord asked.

Ye Tian used the name Ye Tian, and did not use any Endless Lord.

In the Infinite Domain, the Highest Dao Realm with a low cultivation level has no name at all, only a real name.

Therefore, the lord of Longqin Palace called Ye Tian's name.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian had no opinion.

He will definitely fight openly in the future, fight with the Supreme Dao Void Demon, and his strength will definitely be exposed, so there is no need to hide it all the time.

Subsequently.

The Longqin Palace Lord took Ye Tian to a void.

"Ye Tian, you attack!"

The Longqin Palace Master said.

"Longqin Palace Master, I'm offended!"

Ye Tian used the Dao Flow Body Technique to kill the Longqin Palace Master, and the Dao Extreme Spear Technique was condensed in his hand, and he stabbed the Longqin Palace Master with one blow.

This blow can be called the top combat power of the Fivefold Dao Realm.

After seeing this blow, the Longqin Palace Lord was shocked.

In fact, she thought that Ye Tian's strength could reach the fourfold peak to the Dao realm, but it was just that her life-saving ability was strong or her methods were weird, so she killed so many Supreme Dao Void Demons but survived, but she didn't expect to have such terrifying strength.

Airplanes!

The shield was condensed in front of the Lord of the Longqin Palace, and the eighth sequence of the Ten Perfection Realm Supreme Dao Rules were integrated into it, easily resisting Ye Tian's attack.

Next, no matter how Ye Tian attacked, he couldn't break the defense of the Longqin Palace Lord.

The gap in strength between each other is too big!

"Ye Tian, it's okay!" The Longqin Palace Lord stopped Ye Tian's movements.

Ye Tian put away the spear and stopped.

"Ye Tian, I didn't expect your strength to reach the top fivefold Dao realm's combat power, you should be taking the path of the strongest Dao!" said the Longqin Palace Master.

"The path of the strongest to the Tao?"

Ye Tian heard about it for the first time.

The Longqin Palace Lord smiled and said: "The road to the strongest and the most powerful is that every realm is extremely satisfying, the foundation is extremely strong, and it is very easy to fight beyond the level, but it is also more difficult to break through every time." In the entire Infinite Domain, only three of them took the path of the strongest to the Dao, two of them fell, only one is still alive, and that one left the Infinite Domain, and he has not returned for a long time, and it is estimated that he will not return to the Infinite Domain. After all, having seen a wider world, he naturally would not return to the small place of the Infinite Domain. "

Ye Tian chatted with the Longqin Palace Master for a while, and the Longqin Palace Master personally handled the formalities for Ye Tian to join Taisuwei.

Moreover, he also directly gave Ye Tian the position of a king.

Tai Suwei originally had ten monarchs, and now Ye Tian is the eleventh monarch.

Although it is not reasonable to directly give such a high position without making great contributions, Ye Tian's position has no real power at present, he will not have many subordinates, and he is above the third-level battlefield, even if Tai Suwei is dissatisfied with the other Dao realms, he will not enter the third-level battlefield to find trouble with Ye Tian.

After Ye Tian joined Taisuwei, he directly obtained a palace in Taisu Battle City as a place to live and retreat, and he could also browse many ordinary inheritances for free, and the top inheritance needed to be exchanged for battle merits or the contribution value of Taisu Palace.

......

Taisu Palace.

The Longqin Palace Lord came out of the third-level battlefield and reported the information about Ye Tian to Taisu and the other Sevenfold Realm.

After all, recruiting Ye Tian will inevitably offend the Wuji Heavenly Palace, so naturally I have to talk about it, not to mention that Ye Tian is still taking the road of the strongest and the most powerful, with unlimited potential, and he has to report it.

Soon, the Longqin Palace Master met the Taisu Palace Master of the Taisu Palace and several others in the Sevenfold Dao Realm.

"Lord Taisu Palace, I have something important to report. "

The master of Longqin Palace told Ye Tian about it.

After hearing this, Tai Su was immediately shocked.

"The demon-level genius of the Supreme Dao Path!" Tai Su felt that Ye Tian was too demonic, even more demonic than the supreme Dao genius in the historical records.

Those geniuses didn't raise the Supreme Dao rules to the eighth sequence of the Highest Dao Rules in the Second Rank Dao Realm!

Moreover, they could deduce that Ye Tian's cultivation years were not long, and it was incredible that he could be promoted to the Dual Dao Realm so quickly.

"If this Ye Tian can elevate his cultivation to the Fourfold Dao Realm and comprehend the rules of the Seventh Sequence Dao, then ......"

Tai Su was looking forward to it.

If Ye Tian really did this, it would definitely be a sevenfold supreme Dao realm combat power!

Then, with one more Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, there will be more hope for the plan of Taisu Palace!

It's just that Ye Tian was able to be promoted to the Quadruple Dao Realm so quickly?

......

Taisu Battle City.

Ye Tian entered his palace, and then began to cultivate and receive the inheritance of the Great Ghost River's secret arts.

It didn't take long for him to completely memorize the secret technique of the Great Ghost River.

"The secret technique of the good mystery, based on the rules of the eighth sequence of the Dao, can be practiced into the secret technique of the Great Ghost River. "

He found that even the Great Ghost River Secret Technique was not easy to practice, and he could imagine how difficult other secret techniques were to practice.

The Great Ghost River Secret Technique is the easiest secret technique to practice to find the most Taoist strange things, but you also have to study and comprehend it slowly and be cautious before you can practice it within a certain period of time.

But Ye Tian couldn't control it, he was ready to try it frantically, so as to quickly become the secret technique of the Great Ghost River.

If you practice like this, it will be easy to cause physical losses, but you can change to a duplicate body.

So, in the following years, one of his replica bodies frantically cultivated the secret art of the Great Ghost River, and also sent a replica body to fight against the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

Somewhere on the battlefield of the True Dao Domain.

Ye Tian copied the body of a supreme demon, and then infiltrated near a lair.

This lair is the lair of the Supreme Dao Demons, and there are six Quadruple Supreme Dao Void Demons and seventy-three Triple Supreme Dao Void Demons, which is the meeting point of several Supreme Dao Void Demon teams.

At the same time, there were also a large number of Supreme Dao monsters guarding the surroundings, and it was difficult for even the powerhouses of the Supreme Dao Realm to sneak here.

After Ye Tian's supreme demon infiltrated this territory, he occupied a monster cave and began to copy his true body.

Soon, the real body copied the body and condensed out.

Moreover, the imprint of the pseudo-battlefield order also emerged.

Whether it is a battlefield order or a pseudo battlefield order, it is actually linked to the battlefield array, and even if it is multiple clones, they can still have a common battlefield order.

Therefore, no matter which copy of Ye Tian's body kills the enemy, he can get combat merits.

"I've infiltrated it, this time I can get a lot of combat merits by ending this supreme path void demon lair!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Wow!

Ye Tian used the Dao Flow Body Technique and quickly shuttled over.

As he approached the lair, those supreme monsters tried to stop him, and all of them turned to ashes in an instant.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian struck the lair with a fierce blow, causing the lair to collapse in an instant, and more than a dozen of them were hit by the aftermath and killed on the spot.

"Double to the Dao Realm, kill!"

Although these Supreme Dao Void Demons saw that Ye Tian was wrong, they didn't expect too much, and they all killed them together.

"Die!"

One after another spears pierced their bodies, and even if it was a fourfold supreme void demon, it was the result of being instantaneous.

In an instant, these Supreme Dao Void Demons were killed.

Ye Tianyi waved his hand, took away the resources and treasures on their bodies, and then quickly fled from here.

Not long after, several Fivefold Supreme Dao Void Demons rushed here and let out angry roars, but they couldn't find Ye Tian.

In the following days, Ye Tian used this method to kill many Supreme Dao Void Demons, and even killed a Fivefold Supreme Dao Void Demon, greatly relieving the pressure on other Supreme Dao Realms.

And at the same time.

Ye Tian also practiced the secret technique of the Great Ghost River.
